title: Generation Station Project
description: Run the wizard steps, then open the twin, the SLD, the reports and the funding pack.

steps.title: The 14 steps
steps.description: Complete steps in order; each unlocks the next output.
steps.voiceScript: Work through the fourteen steps. Step seven commits your PV sizing.
steps.captionText: Work through the fourteen steps. Step seven commits your PV sizing.
steps.fallbackMessage: The 14 steps: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Cost Plan Deck
steps.voiceScript: The cost plan deck summarises capital cost for your investors.
steps.captionText: The cost plan deck summarises capital cost for your investors.
steps.fallbackMessage: Cost Plan Deck: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: 3D Digital Twin
steps.description: An interactive model of the plant you designed.
steps.voiceScript: Open the three-D digital twin to walk through the plant you designed.
steps.captionText: Open the three-D digital twin to walk through the plant you designed.
steps.fallbackMessage: 3D Digital Twin: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Project Funding
steps.description: Submit the plant to a financial institution.
steps.voiceScript: Project funding packages your design for a financial institution.
steps.captionText: Project funding packages your design for a financial institution.
steps.fallbackMessage: Project Funding: not visible on this page yet.
